name: Cube Zones Texture Metal
description: XR_EXT_display_zones PARITY TEST (ADR-027), macOS Metal texture-class leg: same two-3D-zone + Local2D-strip + wish-mask submission as cube_zones_metal_macos, but the app provides a shared IOSurface and presents it itself — proving a texture app receives the full multi-zone composite written back into its shared surface (M=wish mode, O=overlap toggle).
